revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十七]][[zh:八月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 17|qq=August 17}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Ninna|en|Ninna|qid=Q1346317|lt=Ninna (era)|1=Ninna}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|AD 888|en|AD 888|qid=Q29956|lt=888|1=AD 888}} {{ill|September 26|en|September 26|qid=Q2885|lt=September 26|1=September 26}} ) – The {{ill|Ninna-ji|en|Ninna-ji|qid=Q1202871|lt=Ninna-ji|1=Ninna-ji}} temple in Kyoto is completed. * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō (Japan)|1=Jishō}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} , exiled in {{ill|Hirugakojima|ja|蛭ヶ小島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirugakojima|1=Hirugakojima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625584}} , receives {{ill|Prince Mochihito|en|Prince Mochihito|qid=Q1941666|lt=Prince Mochihito|1=Prince Mochihito}} 's decree calling for the overthrow of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伊勢平氏}} and rises in rebellion. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū (Japan)|1=Bunkyū}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|qid=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}} ) – The {{ill|Tenchūgumi incident|en|Tenchūgumi incident|qid=Q7699558|lt=Tenchūgumi Incident|1=Tenchūgumi incident}} occurs. {{ill|Yoshimura Toratarō|ja|吉村虎太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshimura Toratarō|1=Yoshimura Toratarō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11413307}} and other Sonnō jōi loyalists from Tosa attack the {{ill|Gojō Daikansho|ja|五條代官所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Daikansho|qq=}} in an attempt to overthrow the shogunate. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku (Japan)|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} 15 (Gregorian {{ill|1702|en|1702|qid=Q6819|lt=1702|1=1702}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}} ) – {{ill|Ikeda Tsugumasa|en|Ikeda Tsugumasa|qid=Q28131624|lt=Ikeda Tsugumasa|1=Ikeda Tsugumasa}} , 3rd daimyo of the {{ill|Okayama Domain|1=Okayama Domain|2=ja|3=岡山藩|ja|Okayama Domain|1=Okayama Domain|2=ja|3=岡山藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q903497}} (+ {{ill|1776|en|1776|qid=Q7703|lt=1776|1=1776}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō (era)|1=Tenpō}} 13 (Gregorian {{ill|1842|en|1842|qid=Q7625|lt=1842|1=1842}} {{ill|September 21|en|September 21|qid=Q2891|lt=September 21|1=September 21}} ) – {{ill|Hayashi Yūzō|en|Hayashi Yūzō|qid=Q3128836|lt=Hayashi Yūzō|1=Hayashi Yūzō}} , politician (+ {{ill|1921|en|1921|qid=Q2162|lt=1921|1=1921}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei (era)|1=Ansei}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – {{ill|Hibikimasu Ichitarō|ja|響舛市太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibikimasu Ichitarō|1=Hibikimasu Ichitaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11664397}} , sumo wrestler (+ {{ill|1903|en|1903|qid=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū (Japan)|1=Kenkyū}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1193|en|1193|qid=Q19741|lt=1193|1=1193}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Noriyori|en|Minamoto no Noriyori|qid=Q3142238|lt=Minamoto no Noriyori|1=Minamoto no Noriyori}} , samurai and half-brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} . * {{ill|Genroku (Japan)|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1691|en|1691|qid=Q7682|lt=1691|1=1691}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} ) – {{ill|Kumazawa Banzan|en|Kumazawa Banzan|qid=Q1037304|lt=Kumazawa Banzan|1=Kumazawa Banzan}} , Confucian scholar (* {{ill|1619|en|1619|qid=Q6804|lt=1619|1=1619}} ). ---
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|16|8|18|7|17|9|8|0817|qq=}}
